name: io.github.carsonroell-debug/linkrescue-mcp
title: LinkRescue
description: Broken link detection, monitoring, and AI-powered fix suggestions for websites. Scans URLs or sitemaps, estimates SEO/revenue impact, and returns actionable remediation steps.

tools.name: check_broken_links
tools.description: Scan a URL or sitemap for broken links with SEO impact and revenue loss estimates

tools.name: monitor_links
tools.description: Set up scheduled broken link monitoring for a website

tools.name: get_fix_suggestions
tools.description: Get prioritized remediation steps from a broken links scan report
